lwpdkad gSA MCY;wihvkbZ&ch= 'kqYd esa la’kks/ku dh rkjh[k ls iwoZorhZ 31 ekpZ ds vuqlkj vkSlr Fkksd ewY; lwpdkad gSA [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@335@07&08@lh,eMh&lhvks@thlh vejkorh ¼dksaMkyh&rkysxkao½] vyds’k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo ikn fVIi.kh % ikn fVIi.kh % ikn fVIi.kh % ikn fVIi.kh % ewy vf/klwpuk dk-vk- la[;k 900¼v½] rkjh[k 21 vizSy] 2008 }kjk izdkf’kr dh xbZ Fkh A -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th February, 2015 S.O. 389(E).—In exercise of the power conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956) read with the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby makes following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways number S.O. 900 (E), dated the 21st April, 2008, Published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-Section (ii) namely:— In the said notification for paragraphs 1 (i) of Notes, the following paragraph shall be substituted namely:— (1) For the purpose of this notification; i. “actual fees” means the fee actually charged from the road users of the said section of National Highway on the basis of rate of base fee given in the said schedule and shall be rounded off to the nearest one rupee. (2) The base rate of fee shall be revised once in every year with effect from 1st September of each such year during the operation period of the said agreement and the revised fee shall be computed as follows:— Base Fee x WPI – B WPI – A Where WPI-A = is the Whole Sale Price Index as on June 1997 (131.4) WPI-B = is the Average Whole Sale Price Index as on 31st March – preceding the fee revision date [F. No. NHAI/13013/335/07-08/CMD–CO/GC Amravati (Kondhali–Talegaon)] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Foot Note : The principal notification was published vide number S. O. 900(E), dated the 21st April, 2008. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
